_comment: Prompt Launcher templates. Each template has fields (variables) and a body with {{key}} placeholders. The launcher renders a form from fields, live-fills the body, and copies it. category groups them in the UI. Manual-first: the launcher only composes text you copy — it does NOT send anything anywhere.

templates.title: Lane kickoff (Mission Control–registered)
templates.purpose: Start a new work lane the right way — register it in Mission Control first, then build.

fields.label: Scope (one purpose)
fields.placeholder: Add a saved-prompts library to the launcher

fields.label: Constraints
fields.placeholder: static/manual-first, no backend, no secrets, no live control

templates.template:
Start a new lane: {{lane}} in {{repo}}.

FIRST register the lane in Mission Control (add to lab/mission-control/data/projects.json + agents.json, and any owner action to actions.json), THEN proceed.

Scope (one PR = one purpose):
{{scope}}

Constraints:
{{constraints}}

Deliver one PR lane, verify before claiming done, and end with the Agent Closeout (Asked/Done/Needs you + Repo/Branch/PR/CI/Preview/Files/Verification/Owner action now/Next/Agent state). Do not auto-merge.

templates.title: Agent closeout report
templates.purpose: The required closeout every agent ends with.

fields.label: Needs you
fields.placeholder: Exact owner action, or 'No owner action right now'

fields.label: CI status
fields.placeholder: CI green | local passed, CI pending | no CI configured

fields.label: Verification performed
fields.placeholder: JSON parse, node --check, routes 200, preview deploy

templates.title: Mission Control lane registration
templates.purpose: Register (or update) a lane in the Mission Control data files.
templates.template:
Update Mission Control to register this lane (do not change the UI — edit the data only):

- lab/mission-control/data/projects.json: add { name: "{{lane}}", phase: "{{phase}}", state: "{{state}}", nextAction: "{{next}}" } (fill repo/activePR/lastOwnerAction/notes honestly).
- lab/mission-control/data/agents.json: add the agent row (reported status only).
- lab/mission-control/data/actions.json: add any owner action this lane needs.

Keep labels honest (reported/manual/unknown). Validate the JSON parses.

templates.title: PR pre-merge verification
templates.purpose: Ask an agent to verify a PR against the owner's pre-merge checklist (no merge).
templates.template:
Verify {{repo}} {{pr}} against this checklist and report — do NOT merge:
- CI is green (name the exact checks)
- No merge conflict (mergeable_state)
- No unresolved review comments
- Scope matches the stated lane
- No unrelated files changed
- No secrets or auth changes
- No runtime behavior changed beyond intent

State the exact merge readiness and what (if anything) needs the owner. Merge is owner-only.

templates.title: General agent task
templates.purpose: A clean, honest task prompt with guardrails.

fields.label: Guardrails
fields.placeholder: no backend, no secrets, no live control, one PR lane
